name: Ceviche Acapulco Style
recipeIngredient: 1 Can Whole Tomatoes With Juice (16 Oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the fish into 1-inch pieces and place in lemon juice for 20 minutes, stirring gently to ensure all fish is well coated.
2. Cut the whole tomatoes into 1-inch cubes.
3. Remove the fish from the lemon juice mixture and rinse with fresh water.
4. Mix the prepared fish with the remaining ingredients: olive oil, oregano, black pepper, Tabasco sauce, orange juice, catsup, chopped pickled jalapeno pepper, and onion.
5. Refrigerate the ceviche for at least 6 hours before serving.
6. Serve chilled.
